title: King Dasharatha sends his chief minister Sumantra to summon Rama, from the "Shangri" Ramayana
medium: Gum tempera and ink on paper
culture: Northern India, Pahari kingdoms, Himachal Pradesh
creditLine: Cleveland Museum of Art. Gift of Norman Zaworski in honor of Sherman and Ruth Lee
tags: Scene from the "Shangri" Ramayana (History or Rama)
King Dasharatha sends his Prime Minister to summon Rama, from Chapter 16 of the Ayodhya Kanda (Book of Ayodhya) of the "Shangri" Ramayana (Rama's Journey)
